International Maritime  Summer Academy 2024 Begins!

This year, the KHAS International Maritime Law Summer Academy will be held between 22 July and 8 August 2024, in collaboration with DEHUKAM and the National University of Singapore International Law Centre, at the Kadir Has University Cibali Campus.

The KHAS International Maritime Law Summer Academy brings together judges on international courts, academics and practitioners working in the field of international law, and provides training on fundamental issues related to Maritime Law. In addition to courses on fundamental issues, certain courses in the program are dedicated to a specific topic selected for that year, aiming to increase awareness and knowledge about current issues related to maritime law. The courses given in the program are taught in English by experts who are experts in the relevant field.

For details of the 2024 program:

https://lawoftheseaacademy.khas.edu.tr/
